description: obono is an Austrian cloud cash-register system for creating legally compliant receipts and operating virtual cash registers under RKSV rules. Its website describes a mobile, paperless point-of-sale product with API-based integration into existing systems.
summary: obono.at exposes one documented REST API: the obono RKSV API, described by an OpenAPI spec and authenticated primarily with JWTs obtained via a Basic-auth `/auth` call.
